mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (account, name, password, email, phone, avatar, intro, security_question, security_answer, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{account}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{intro}, #{securityQuestion}, #{securityAnswer}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
